instagramMonetisation.estimatedMonthlyRange: Build to 10,000 followers to unlock monetisation programmes.

revenueStreams.name: YouTube AdSense
revenueStreams.notes: Configure payout in YouTube Studio > Monetisation > AdSense. Payments monthly when balance exceeds GBP 70.

revenueStreams.name: YouTube Shorts Revenue
revenueStreams.unlockRequirements: 1,000 subscribers + 10 million Shorts views in 90 days
revenueStreams.notes: Shorts revenue pool: approximately GBP 0.04-0.10 per 1,000 Shorts views. Volume is the strategy here.

revenueStreams.name: Instagram Reels Bonus
revenueStreams.unlockRequirements: Invite-only. Build to 10,000+ followers and maintain consistent Reels posting to get invited.
revenueStreams.notes: Instagram pays per play on qualifying Reels. Range: GBP 0-1000/month depending on reach. Not available in all markets.

revenueStreams.name: Brand Partnerships
revenueStreams.notes: At 10k followers/subs expect GBP 100-500 per post. At 100k expect GBP 500-5000. Outreach starts at 5k. Always disclose with #ad.

revenueStreams.name: Affiliate Commissions
revenueStreams.notes: Amazon Associates, Impact, PartnerStack. 5-20% commission. Always disclose affiliate links. UK: must comply with ASA rules.

revenueStreams.name: YouTube Channel Memberships
revenueStreams.unlockRequirements: 1,000 subscribers and no Community Guideline strikes
revenueStreams.notes: Approximately 1% of subscribers convert to members at GBP 4.99/month. YouTube takes 30%.

milestones.name: Brand Deal Tier 2 (significant income)
milestones.revenueUnlock: GBP 500-5,000 per post/video. Full-time income potential.

nextActions: YouTube: 1000 more subscribers needed for YPP. Post 2 long-form videos per week.
YouTube: 4000 more watch hours needed. Longer videos and playlists build watch time fastest.
Instagram: 10000 more followers to unlock Reels Bonus. Post 4-5 Reels per week and engage with comments.
Affiliate: Sign up to Amazon Associates and add product links to YouTube descriptions immediately.
Brand deals: Create a media kit PDF with your stats. Reach out to 5 relevant brands per week at 5,000+ followers.
Instagram: Connect Composio INSTAGRAM connector to enable content scheduling via this system.
YouTube: Connect Composio YOUTUBE connector to enable metadata optimisation via this system.
